content: Railway config-as-code: railway.json at repo root. Key fields: deploy.healthcheckPath, deploy.healthcheckTimeout (default 300s), deploy.startCommand, deploy.restartPolicyType. Builder: Nixpacks auto-detects Go (builds with 'go build', runs binary). App must listen on PORT env var (Railway sets it). Healthcheck origin is healthcheck.railway.app — allowlist if restricting by host. Branch-based: Railway service settings map a branch to a service. production branch does not exist yet — must create. Railpack (newer Nixpacks successor) is also available.
